chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2142 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders as to maintainability of petition. 29.05.2025 Mr. Ismail Shah, advocate for the petitioner. On the last date, following order was passed: “22.05.2025 Mr. Ismail Shah, advocate for the petitioner. 1. Urgency granted. 2to4. Office has raised following objections: “1. How this Petition is maintainable in present form? 2. Why proper forum was not approached prior to filing of this Petition? 3. Why Petitioner is filing this Petition in personal capacity, if in personal capacity so how the Petitioner is an aggrieved person with the impugned Notification? 4. No document is attached to prove that the Petitioner is the President of the Association, so how the Petitioner is claiming as President of the Association in Para 2? 5. Why aggrieved persons are not coming in front and filing the Petition? 6. Legible copies of Page No. 13 to 21 to be filed.” Counsel to assist on 29.05.2025.” Even today, office objections could not be addressed and even otherwise petitioner’s counsel remains unable to establish locus standi to maintain this petition. Petition is found to be mis-conceived, hence, dismissed in limine alongwith pending applications. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
